examples: Leisure is often defined in opposition to work.
Whale-watching has become a growth leisure industry.
These days we have more money and more leisure to enjoy it.
Office workers and leisure lunchers devour Vietnamese roast pork banh mi sandwiches from Nomnom ( www.nomnomtruck.com).
Portland, Ore. researcher Bertrand Sperling analyzed crime and culture-and-leisure data, as well as education levels.
